title: × Serapicamptis garbariorum
intro: There is insufficient information about × Serapicamptis garbariorum.
taxonomy: × Serapicamptis garbariorum is a hybrid species of orchid, classified under the genus × Serapicamptis. This genus is a nothogenus, meaning it is a hybrid combination of the genera Coeloglossum and Serapias. The nothogenus × Serapicamptis is recognized as a distinct group of orchids that exhibit characteristics from both parent genera. × Serapicamptis garbariorum is specifically classified as a species within this nothogenus, combining elements of Coeloglossum and Serapias species. The classification of × Serapicamptis garbariorum reflects its unique characteristics and genetic makeup.
uses: I couldn't find any reliable sources confirming medicinal uses of the plant × Serapicamptis garbariorum.
